10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve – Easier inflation made simple - Bike-Discount
10.evidenceText: The Schwalbe Clik Valve introduces a new and effortless way to inflate your bike tires. With a simple click, the pump connects securely to the valve
10.extractionRationale: No price information was found in the provided source content. The excerpt only contains product description text without any retail price, cost, or monetary value mentioned.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless-Ventil - 2er Set - 60 mm | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct product URLs identified: p1859949.html (60mm), p1859948.html (40mm), p1859950.html (80mm). Source 4 is a category page, Source 5 is a tube accessory.
27.extractionRationale: Counted only unique product page URLs for Clik Valve products. Excluded the category/filter page (Source 4) and the tube product (Source 5) which are accessories or aggregation pages, not standalone Clik Valve products. Three distinct 2er Set variations at different heights (40mm, 60mm, 80mm) represent 3 separate product listings.
